visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Close-up of a young woman with dark hair tied back in a bun, wearing a white collared shirt over a striped top and a star-shaped silver pendant, chewing a green grape in a brightly lit indoor kitchen with white cabinetry. (2) She holds up two vibrant green grapes directly to the camera lens, emphasizing their shape and color, then eats them; the shot cuts to her holding a large, heavy bunch of grapes while giving a confident thumbs up. (3) A fast-paced montage of salad preparation: green grapes are submerged in a glass bowl of splashing water, sliced cleanly on a light wooden cutting board, and layered onto a white plate with fresh green lettuce, a large white burrata cheese ball, and reddish slices of cured ham. (4) Hand-held camera angles show her sprinkling crushed walnut pieces over the assembly and grinding sea salt and black pepper from a mill, followed by a steady drizzle of golden olive oil and dark, viscous balsamic glaze. (5) Metal scissors slice into the center of the soft burrata cheese, which spills creamy white curd onto the salad; she then uses a fork to take a large bite, smiling with a joyful facial expression. (6) A new scene displays a pink plate holding party style skewers made of grapes, ham, and cheese; she pours balsamic vinegar into a small glass bowl and eats one skewer, nodding in approval. (7) The woman sits at a wooden table with a small glass bowl of grapes, gesturing actively with her hands while speaking to the camera; the lighting is bright and even, highlighting her expressive features. (8) High-detail close-ups of the grapes are interspersed with the woman eating another grape and giving a final thumbs up; yellow and white text overlays appear throughout the frame to emphasize her points.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 用葡萄做 超好吃的油醋沙拉. (2) [Subtitle]: 步驟一 葡萄對切. (3) [Subtitle]: 步驟二 放上生菜. (4) [Subtitle]: 步驟三 布拉塔起司. (5) [Subtitle]: 步驟四 擺上生火腿. (6) [Subtitle]: 步驟五 撒上核桃碎片. (7) [Subtitle]: 步驟六 些許海鹽跟胡椒. (8) [Subtitle]: 步驟七 淋上橄欖油. (9) [Subtitle]: 步驟九 剪開起司. (10) [Variety]: 完成!!. (11) [Variety]: 豪豪吃!!. (12) [Slogan]: 除了剛剛那個也可以做 朋友來的派對版本 好看又好吃. (13) [Variety]: 華麗. (14) [Variety]: 單人派對... (15) [Slogan]: 今天使用的是 加州葡萄. (16) [Slogan]: 天然健康的隨身零食. (17) [Slogan]: 加州葡萄! 富含多酚、抗氧化物. (18) [Slogan]: 守護心臟、大腦 腸道、肌膚 以及你的免疫力. (19) [Slogan]: 清爽多汁低熱量 超過80種品種. (20) [Slogan]: 讓你從五月吃到一月. (21) [Slogan]: 一口嚐遍 加州陽光的精華. (22) [Slogan]: 大家快去跟著做! 簡單又好吃!

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a white shirt over a striped top and a star necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern kitchen with white cabinets, a refrigerator, a sink, and various kitchen appliances.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with exceptionally sharp, high-transient chewing and crunching sounds as the woman eats a grape; there is no background music, creating an ASMR-grade focus on the percussive texture of the fruit skin and flesh. (2) An upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic-pop background music track fades in, featuring bright guitar strums and a rhythmic wooden percussion beat; the woman's voice is high-pitched, clear, and energetic with a friendly, welcoming tone. (3) Rapid percussive thud sounds occur as grapes are sliced, perfectly synchronized with the editing; the BGM continues at a steady tempo, maintaining a joyful and lighthearted atmosphere throughout the preparation sequence. (4) Soft rustling of leaves and a wet, muffled plop accompany the placement of the cheese, while the speaker's narration is fast-paced and enthusiastic, exhibiting high pitch variability and frequent rising intonations for emphasis. (5) A distinct mechanical grinding sound from a pepper mill creates a mid-frequency textured noise event; the BGM remains dominant but allows the incidental culinary sounds to remain clearly audible in the mix. (6) A metallic click-snip sound from the scissors cutting the burrata is followed by a high-arousal exclamation of 'Wan cheng!' (Finished!); the vocal delivery here is very bright with strong projection and a joyful valence. (7) Slurping and chewing sounds return momentarily as she tastes the dish, followed by a transition where the BGM swells; her speech density increases as she begins explaining the nutritional benefits of the California grapes. (8) A digital ping or bell SFX marks a transition to product close-ups; the narration becomes more professional yet remains animated, with excellent articulation clarity and a confident, authoritative yet approachable persona. (9) The background music maintains a constant major-mode tonality, while incidental sounds like the clinking of a fork against a plate and the rustling of a grape bunch add to the domestic kitchen atmosphere. (10) The recording ends with a final energetic closing phrase and a brief swell in the background music before a hard cut; the overall signal-to-noise ratio is high, indicating a clean, studio-like recording environment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Tutorial -> Variations -> Information -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional cooking tutorial for California Grapes. It begins with an sensory hook (ASMR chewing), demonstrates two versatile salad recipes using the grapes, and concludes with a high-energy information segment detailing the nutritional benefits and variety of the fruit to encourage purchase and consumption.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly names 'California Grapes' and lists specific health benefits while showcasing the product extensively.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media production using fast-paced editing and vibrant colors to market a food product.
